---
title: 'Store'
date: '2012-06-02T05:03:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5263508105241860065'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/store_1.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<br />The Following are my suggestions for other resources that could impact your life for the better!<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><h3 style="text-align: center;"><b>Banking Basics for Believers, By Me:</b></h3><br /><b>Bulldog Publications:&nbsp;</b><br /><b><a href="http://www.amazon.com/dp/1453815619/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=your0f4d-20&amp;camp=213381&amp;creative=390973&amp;linkCode=as4&amp;creativeASIN=1453815619&amp;adid=1NAWEWPYWDQA3XGCY7N5&amp;&amp;ref-refURL=http%3A%2F%2Fn2gs.blogspot.com%2F" target="_blank">Bankings Basics for Believers; Now Available on Amazon.&nbsp;</a></b><br />Print&nbsp;Edition<br /><iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?lt1=_blank&amp;bc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;fc1=000000&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=as4&amp;m=amazon&amp;f=ifr&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;asins=1453815619" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe><br /><br />Kindle Edition<br /><iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://rcm.amazon.com/e/cm?lt1=_blank&amp;bc1=000000&amp;IS2=1&amp;bg1=FFFFFF&amp;fc1=000000&amp;lc1=0000FF&amp;t=your0f4d-20&amp;o=1&amp;p=8&amp;l=as4&amp;m=amazon&amp;f=ifr&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;asins=B008EO488Y" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><blockquote class="tr_bq"></blockquote></blockquote></blockquote><h3 style="text-align: center;"><b>Books, By Others:</b></h3><div><b>&nbsp;<i>As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another. (</i><i>Proverbs 27:17 NIV)</i></b></div><div><b><i><br /></i></b></div><b>These are some great resources written by others. Both Spiritual and Natural Success books that are must reads. See more @&nbsp;</b><b style="background-color: white; color: #181ecd; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20" style="background-color: white; color: #181ecd; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px;" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a></b><br /><br /><table cellspacing="0" class="products" style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: start; width: 482px;"><tbody><tr class="imagerow"><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0881149527" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The Laws of Prosperity" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/51k04sfgc7l-sl125-0a071de104b8.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0883687305" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="Grace: The Power To Change" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/41sagkoq8kl-sl125-ad43e39677f4.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/1577941322" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="Faith and Confession" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/51otgg3bmal-sl125-a54d42379218.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td></tr><tr class="textrow"><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0881149527" style="color: #181ecd;">The Laws of Prosperity</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Kenneth Copeland</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$9.99<br /><br /><br /></span></td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0883687305" style="color: #181ecd;">Grace: The Power To Change</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">James B. Richards</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$9.88</span><br />Originally recommended to me by Pastor Chris Wilder</td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/1577941322" style="color: #181ecd;">Faith and Confession</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Charles Capps</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$10.87</span><br />Among the best texts I've ever seen on understanding faith's functions in a practical way.<br /><br /></td></tr></tbody></table><table cellspacing="0" class="products" style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: start; width: 482px;"><tbody><tr class="imagerow"><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/1604631147" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The Blessing of the Lord: Makes Rich and He Adds No Sorrow With It" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/513cu-p7k8l-sl125-e27f48509b94.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/160708306X" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The Final Quest" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/51-uk4zc7wl-sl125-84309983b052.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0785267131" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The Vision A Two-in-one Volume Of The Final Quest And The Call" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/51zf9qar0fl-sl125-63d95d244688.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td></tr><tr class="textrow"><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/1604631147" style="color: #181ecd;">The Blessing of the Lord: Makes Rich and He...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Kenneth Copeland</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$13.31</span></td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/160708306X" style="color: #181ecd;">The Final Quest</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Rick Joyner</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$10.87</span></td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0785267131" style="color: #181ecd;">The Vision A Two-in-one Volume Of The Final...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Rick Joyner</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$12.15</span><b>See Also:&nbsp;</b></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><table cellspacing="0" class="products" style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: start; width: 482px;"><tbody><tr class="imagerow"><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0066620996" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="Good to Great: Why Some Companies Make the Leap... and Others Don't" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/313w-vjib5l-sl125-70ae7d225d87.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0470100281" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The Energy Bus: 10 Rules to Fuel Your Life, Work, and Team with Positive Energy" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/41gvz8nw6il-sl125-f824c48ea05b.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/076242723X" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="Change the Way You See Everything through Asset-Based Thinking" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/512ign5oeil-sl125-f8ecd9ea0793.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td></tr><tr class="textrow"><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0066620996" style="color: #181ecd;">Good to Great: Why Some Companies Make the ...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Jim Collins</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$19.79</span></td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0470100281" style="color: #181ecd;">The Energy Bus: 10 Rules to Fuel Your Life,...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Jon Gordon</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$14.59</span></td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/076242723X" style="color: #181ecd;">Change the Way You See Everything through A...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Kathryn D. Cramer</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$16.50</span></td></tr></tbody></table><table cellspacing="0" class="products" style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: start; width: 482px;"><tbody><tr class="imagerow"><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0743269519" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/51osk63eabl-sl125-a1a09ad802d9.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td></tr><tr class="textrow"><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0743269519" style="color: #181ecd;">The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Stephen R. Covey</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$8.49</span></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><table cellspacing="0" class="products" style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; text-align: start; width: 482px;"><tbody><tr class="imagerow"><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0786864370" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="How to Become CEO: The Rules for Rising to the Top of Any Organization" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/415b-y26y5l-sl125-eea562b7dcdf.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/159555078X" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="The Total Money Makeover: A Proven Plan for Financial Fitness" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/517lv72u4vl-sl125-820ff5d6d0bf.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td><td style="padding: 5px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/B001BYLFFS" style="color: #181ecd;"><img alt="Expelled: No Intelligence Allowed" src="/images/imported/ecx-images-amazon-com/51hozwvwqkl-sl125-d56c6d671c0c.jpg" style="border: none;" /></a></td></tr><tr class="textrow"><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 150px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/0786864370" style="color: #181ecd;">How to Become CEO: The Rules for Rising to ...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Jeffrey J. Fox</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$11.22</span></td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/159555078X" style="color: #181ecd;">The Total Money Makeover: A Proven Plan for...</a><br />by&nbsp;<span class="by">Dave Ramsey</span><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$14.66</span><br />Among the Finest authors on financial planning alive, and a Christian too.</td><td style="padding: 5px 5px 20px; vertical-align: top; width: 151px;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/detail/B001BYLFFS" style="color: #181ecd;">Expelled: No Intelligence Allowed</a><br /><span class="price" style="font-weight: bold;">$7.93</span><br />Science? of evolution going down hill!</td></tr></tbody></table><br /><b><br /></b><h3 style="text-align: center;"><b>Merchandise:</b></h3><ul><li>N2 Good Success Merchandise</li><ul><li>Please see the&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a>&nbsp;for motivational products.&nbsp;</li><li>You can also design your own things here. Ever wanted your FAVORITE verse or saying on a mug? Do it here, at Zazzle!&nbsp;</li></ul></ul><div><embed flashvars="feedId=0&amp;path=http://www.zazzle.com/assets/swf/zp/skins" height="300" src="http://www.zazzle.com/utl/getpanel?tl=My%20Zazzle%20Panel&amp;at=238174440691742196&amp;cn=238174440691742196&amp;st=date_created" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="450" wmode="transparent"></embed></div><div><a href="http://www.zazzle.com/">make custom gifts</a>&nbsp;at&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/">Zazzle</a></div><div><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
